title: lycopersicon sitiens
intro: Lycopersicon sitiens, also known as the wild tomato plant, is a species of flowering plant in the nightshade family that is native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lycopersicon sitiens include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared as a tincture, tea, or salve, and is often used to treat skin conditions, wounds, and other topical issues.
